_note: CK detachment modifiers — game mechanics only. Engine loads this for DPP/SURV/MOB computation. Modeled as always-on unless noted. 8 detachments total (11e Faction Pack).

choices.name: Annihilate the Unworthy
choices.description: +1 to hit rolls vs battle-shocked units (modeled as always-on)

choices.name: Pack Hunters
choices.description: War Dogs gain +1 to wound when charging

choices.name: Relentless Pursuit
choices.description: War Dogs can Advance and charge

choices.name: Board Control
choices.condition: DAMNED allies gain +2" move; CK gain battleshock immunity near objectives
choices.description: Objective play buffs for Iconoclast Fiefdom

choices.name: Darkness Cloak
choices.description: Stealth (-1 to hit) from enhanced Darkness aura

choices.name: Synergized Assault
choices.condition: when War Dog and CHAOS KNIGHTS TITANIC units are both on battlefield
choices.description: Re-roll 1s to hit and wound when mixed force

choices.name: Unstoppable Advance
choices.description: Charge after Advance or Fall Back

choices.name: Pack Alpha
choices.condition: when within 6" of another War Dog unit
choices.description: War Dogs gain +1 Sustained Hits when near packmates

choices.name: Dread Aura
choices.condition: Harbingers of Dread darkness extended to 9"
choices.description: Extended Darkness aura gives Stealth (-1 to hit)

choices.name: Diabolic Power
choices.description: Lethal Hits or Sustained Hits 1 when shooting/fighting (Empowered)
